# Qué Onda Cancún

> Daily local guide to Cancún in Spanish, covering what to do today, events, promotions, restaurants, nightlife, weather, sargassum, and useful local signals.

Canonical site: https://queondacancun.com/
Language: es-MX
Primary geography: Cancún, Quintana Roo, México
Freshness: updated daily around 01:00 America/Cancun through the platform refresh pipeline.

## Key pages

- https://queondacancun.com/ - Qué hacer hoy en Cancún: current events, promotions, restaurants, tours, weather, sargassum, and useful daily signals.
- https://queondacancun.com/esta-semana/ - Weekly Cancún agenda and local planning signals.
- https://queondacancun.com/promos/ - Active Cancún promotions for restaurants, tours, nightlife, experiences, and local plans.
- https://queondacancun.com/eventos/ - Curated Cancún event agenda for today and the week.
- https://queondacancun.com/party/ - Source-backed Cancun nightlife, antros, shows, and party reservation paths.
- https://queondacancun.com/newsletter/ - Weekly editorial newsletter.

## Machine-readable references

- https://queondacancun.com/data/platform.json - current platform data used by the website.
- https://queondacancun.com/sitemap.xml - canonical URL list.
- https://queondacancun.com/robots.txt - crawler policy and sitemap reference.

## Editorial notes

Qué Onda Cancún is a local, independent guide. Source-gathered information is filtered before publishing, and prior valid content is preserved when fresh source confidence is not high enough.
